response.title: Lead Retail Operations Manager
response.description: We are seeking a Lead Retail Operations Manager to oversee our store operations and drive sales performance. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of managing retail teams and implementing effective operational strategies. You will be responsible for ensuring exceptional customer experiences, optimizing inventory management, and enhancing overall store efficiency. If you are passionate about retail and possess strong leadership skills, we would love to hear from you.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or related field
